x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: MID Servers execute TSOM AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation actions. Without healthy MID Servers AI actions fail silently.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr.addQuery("status","Up");gr.query();var up=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers Up. Now Assist TSOM AI Agent-triggered probes and remediation actions require available MID Servers.":up+" MID Servers Up -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agent actions can execute."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure MID Servers are Up and validated for each network zone. Upgrade to current instance version.
